# fiber

## Overview

The [**fiber**](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/) package provides two
[S7](https://rconsortium.github.io/S7/) classes — `streamline` and
`bundle` — for representing diffusion MRI tractography data in R,
together with a concise set of methods:

| Function | Description |
|----|----|
| `new_streamline()` | Construct a single streamline |
| `new_bundle()` | Construct a bundle of streamlines |
| [`bind_bundles()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/bind_bundles.md) | Combine streamlines and/or bundles |
| [`reparametrize()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/reparametrize.md) | Resample onto a uniform arc-length grid |
| [`get_euclidean_length()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_euclidean_length.md) | Straight-line distance between endpoints |
| [`get_curvilinear_length()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_curvilinear_length.md) | Total arc-length |
| [`get_sinuosity()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_sinuosity.md) | Curvilinear / Euclidean length ratio |
| [`get_curvature()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_curvature.md) | Curvature profile or summary scalar |
| [`get_torsion()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_torsion.md) | Torsion profile or summary scalar |
| `get_hausdorff_distance()` | Symmetric Hausdorff distance |

### Classes

A `streamline` stores:

- `@points` — an $`n \times 3`$ numeric matrix with columns `"X"`,
  `"Y"`, `"Z"`.
- `@point_data` — a named list of per-point numeric vectors (length
  $`n`$).
- `@streamline_data` — a named list of per-streamline numeric scalars.

A `bundle` stores:

- `@streamlines` — a list of `streamline` objects.
- `@bundle_data` — a named list of bundle-level metadata.

## Installation

You can install the development version of **fiber** from
[GitHub](https://github.com/astamm/fiber) with:

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("astamm/fiber")
```

## Quick start

``` r

library(fiber)

# Build a helix streamline (50 points)
t <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 50)
sl <- new_streamline(
  points = cbind(X = cos(t), Y = sin(t), Z = t / (2 * pi))
)
sl
#> <streamline [50 pts]>

# Shape descriptors
get_curvilinear_length(sl)
#> [1] 6.358015
get_sinuosity(sl)
#> [1] 6.358015
head(get_curvature(sl))
#>           s    curvature
#> 1 0.0000000 1.537338e-05
#> 2 0.1297554 1.625127e-02
#> 3 0.2595108 4.592627e-02
#> 4 0.3892662 8.636675e-02
#> 5 0.5190216 1.352354e-01
#> 6 0.6487770 1.906608e-01

# Bundle two streamlines
sl2 <- new_streamline(
  points = cbind(X = cos(t) * 1.1, Y = sin(t) * 1.1, Z = t / (2 * pi))
)
b <- bind_bundles(sl, sl2)
b
#> <bundle [2 streamlines | 50–50 pts/streamline]>

# Reparametrize to 20 points each
b20 <- reparametrize(b, n_points = 20L)
b20
#> <bundle [2 streamlines | 20–20 pts/streamline]>

# Hausdorff distance
get_hausdorff_distance(sl, sl2)
#> [1] 0.1
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_shape_descriptors-fiber-bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/add_shape_descriptors-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  [`add_shape_descriptors,fiber::bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/add_shape_descriptors-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  :

  [`add_shape_descriptors()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/add_shape_descriptors.md)
  method for `bundle` objects

- [`add_shape_descriptors-fiber-streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/add_shape_descriptors-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  [`add_shape_descriptors,fiber::streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/add_shape_descriptors-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  :

  [`add_shape_descriptors()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/add_shape_descriptors.md)
  method for `streamline` objects

- [`add_shape_descriptors()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/add_shape_descriptors.md)
  : Adds shape descriptors to a streamline or bundle

- [`as_bundle-fiber-bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_bundle-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  [`as_bundle,fiber::bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_bundle-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  :

  [`as_bundle()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_bundle.md)
  method for `bundle` objects

- [`as_bundle-fiber-streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_bundle-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  [`as_bundle,fiber::streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_bundle-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  :

  [`as_bundle()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_bundle.md)
  method for `streamline` objects

- [`as_bundle()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_bundle.md)
  : Coerce an object to a bundle

- [`as_dwifiber-fiber-bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_dwifiber-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  [`as_dwifiber,fiber::bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_dwifiber-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  :

  [`as_dwifiber()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_dwifiber.md)
  method for `bundle` objects

- [`as_dwifiber-fiber-streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_dwifiber-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  [`as_dwifiber,fiber::streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_dwifiber-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  :

  [`as_dwifiber()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_dwifiber.md)
  method for `streamline` objects

- [`as_dwifiber()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_dwifiber.md)
  :

  Coerce a streamline or bundle to a `dwiFiber` object

- [`as_streamline-fiber-bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_streamline-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  [`as_streamline,fiber::bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_streamline-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  :

  [`as_streamline()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_streamline.md)
  method for `bundle` objects

- [`as_streamline-fiber-streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_streamline-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  [`as_streamline,fiber::streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_streamline-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  :

  [`as_streamline()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_streamline.md)
  method for `streamline` objects

- [`as_streamline()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/as_streamline.md)
  : Coerce an object to a streamline

- [`bind_bundles()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/bind_bundles.md)
  : Combine streamlines and/or bundles into a single bundle

- [`bundle()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/bundle.md) :
  Bundle S7 class

- [`compute_hausdorff_distance,any-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance-any-method.md)
  :

  [`compute_hausdorff_distance()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance.md)
  catch-all method

- [`compute_hausdorff_distance-fiber-bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  [`compute_hausdorff_distance,fiber::bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  :

  [`compute_hausdorff_distance()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance.md)
  method for `bundle` objects

- [`compute_hausdorff_distance-fiber-streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  [`compute_hausdorff_distance,fiber::streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  :

  [`compute_hausdorff_distance()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance.md)
  method for two `streamline` objects

- [`compute_hausdorff_distance()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/compute_hausdorff_distance.md)
  : Computes the Hausdorff distance between streamlines

- [`get_curvature()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_curvature.md)
  : Curvature of a streamline

- [`get_curvilinear_length()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_curvilinear_length.md)
  : Curvilinear length of a streamline

- [`get_euclidean_length()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_euclidean_length.md)
  : Euclidean length of a streamline

- [`get_sinuosity()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_sinuosity.md)
  : Sinuosity of a streamline

- [`get_torsion()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/get_torsion.md)
  : Torsion of a streamline

- [`is_bundle()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/is_bundle.md)
  : Test whether an object is a bundle

- [`is_streamline()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/is_streamline.md)
  : Test whether an object is a streamline

- [`reparametrize-fiber-bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/reparametrize-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  [`reparametrize,fiber::bundle-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/reparametrize-fiber-bundle-method.md)
  :

  [`reparametrize()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/reparametrize.md)
  method for `bundle` objects

- [`reparametrize-fiber-streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/reparametrize-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  [`reparametrize,fiber::streamline-method`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/reparametrize-fiber-streamline-method.md)
  :

  [`reparametrize()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/reparametrize.md)
  method for `streamline` objects

- [`reparametrize()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/reparametrize.md)
  : Reparametrize a streamline or bundle onto a uniform arc-length grid

- [`streamline()`](https://astamm.github.io/fiber/reference/streamline.md)
  : Streamline S7 class
